fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item for which the prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Sales Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales type of the prepayment percentage.

fields.name: Sales Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that belongs to the sales type.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to which the prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Prepayment %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the prepayment percentage to use to calculate the prepayment for sales.
